author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit fd8e6e22. Added DimSpec (Static/Dynamic with optional min/max range), InputSpec, export_with_dynamic_shapes() entry point, and ExportedProgram.input_specs field in ferrotorch-jit. Wired through ferrotorch-serialize::export_from_program which merges program-level dynamic axes into OnnxExportConfig.dynamic_axes (caller overrides win on conflict), flowing symbolic names end-to-end into the ONNX dim_param output. 7 new tests; 3900 workspace tests pass.
